mapper.select: SELECT * FROM warehouse_location WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY zone, sort_order
SELECT * FROM warehouse_location WHERE zone = #{zone} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO warehouse_location (code, name, zone, zone_name, capacity, sort_order, status) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{zone}, #{zoneName}, #{capacity}, #{sortOrder}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE warehouse_location SET code=#{code}, name=#{name}, zone=#{zone}, zone_name=#{zoneName}, capacity=#{capacity}, sort_order=#{sortOrder} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE warehouse_location SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
